title: Planning a Picnic
scenario: Weekend Picnic Plans
prompt: Imagine you are planning a picnic this weekend with your friends. Describe what you will do. First, talk about where you will go for the picnic. Then, explain what food and drinks you will bring. Finally, share what activities you will do at the picnic.
imagePrompt: A sunny park filled with greenery and colorful flowers. There is a big, checked picnic blanket spread out on the grass. Nearby, a picnic basket overflowing with sandwiches, fruits, and drinks sits waiting. Friends are laughing and getting ready to play frisbee and cards. In the background, children are playing on a playground and people are jogging along the park paths. The sky is bright blue with fluffy white clouds, creating a perfect day for a picnic.
tips: Use simple words and sentences.
Organize your ideas with clear steps.

Families are having picnics on picnic blankets, children are playing on the playground, and groups of friends are playing frisbee or soccer. title: Urban Development vs. Environmental Preservation
scenario: Balancing Growth and Sustainability
prompt: Imagine that you are a member of a city council in Canada discussing a proposed urban development project. The project aims to build new housing units and commercial spaces in a rapidly growing area, which promises economic benefits and job creation. However, this area is home to a significant wetland ecosystem that is vital for local wildlife and serves as a natural flood barrier. As a council member, make a prediction about the potential outcomes of approving or rejecting this project. Consider the competing priorities of economic growth, environmental preservation, and community needs, presenting nuanced arguments for both sides, while acknowledging the ethical implications involved.
imagePrompt: The scene is set in a bustling city council chamber filled with representatives and concerned citizens. title: Urban Green Space Development
scenario: Balancing Nature and Development
